description: Simulated customer profiles representing different lifecycle stages and segments for Demo Brand marketing

lifecycle_stages.awareness: Knows of Demo Brand but not engaged
lifecycle_stages.interest: Follows on one platform, occasional engagement
lifecycle_stages.consideration: Actively consuming content, considering first event/purchase
lifecycle_stages.first_action: Attended first event or made first purchase
lifecycle_stages.loyal_customer: Season purchase holder, merchandise buyer, advocate
lifecycle_stages.ambassador: Creates content, recruits other customers, community leader

customer_profiles.name: Marko Novak
customer_profiles.notes: Third-generation Demo Brand customer. Father had annual membership. Attends most home eventes including launch events.

customer_profiles.name: Ana Jurić
customer_profiles.notes: Became a customer during 2018 global campaign excitement. Mostly engages through social media. Prefers player personality content over tactical.

customer_profiles.name: Ivan Kovačić
customer_profiles.notes: Moved to Munich in 2005 for work. Follows every event online. Returns for events 2-3 times per year. Buys brand event packages. Facebook is primary platform.

customer_profiles.name: Luka Tomić
customer_profiles.notes: Lives in Split (competitor territory) but started following Demo Brand through TikTok content. Not yet converted to attending/purchasing. High potential if content strategy continues.

customer_profiles.name: Maria Horvat-Müller
customer_profiles.notes: Second-generation Austrian. Father was a Demo Brand customer. Recently started following after seeing a international-targeted Instagram ad. Bilingual but prefers German content.

customer_profiles.name: Tomislav Babić
customer_profiles.notes: 40+ years as a customer. Runs a Demo Brand customer blog with 5K followers. Creates content about Demo Brand history. Takes his children to eventes. Community leader in customer forums.

customer_profiles.name: James Wilson
customer_profiles.notes: Football enthusiast who watches marketing campaign. Aware of Demo Brand through marketing coverage. Potential follower if content reaches him through brand-related algorithms. Represents expansion market opportunity.

customer_profiles.name: Petra Šimunović
customer_profiles.notes: From Osijek (has local team) but became Demo Brand customer during marketing campaign success. Travels to Zagreb for big eventes. Very active in social media comments and story replies.

customer_profiles.name: Drago Petrović
customer_profiles.notes: Emigrated to Chicago in 1990. Follows results via Facebook and brand news sites. Buys merchandise as gifts. Member of brand community in Chicago. Watches CL eventes on brand streaming.

customer_profiles.name: Nikola Mandžukić
customer_profiles.notes: Software engineer in Zürich. Follows every product launch online. Returns for brand events. High purchasing power. Would attend more if travel packages were better organized.

customer_profiles.name: Sara Knežević
customer_profiles.notes: Started following Demo Brand because school friends talked about TikTok content. Father took her to first event. Plays marketing in school team. Future academy/customer development target.

customer_profiles.name: Emir Hadžić
customer_profiles.notes: competitor customer primarily, but follows Demo Brand as regional CL representative. Engages during major campaigns. Could be converted to regular follower with right content.

customer_profiles.name: Mia Barišić
customer_profiles.notes: Moved to Dublin for work in 2018. Following Demo Brand connects her to home. Watches with other locals in Dublin meetups. Would buy more if international shipping were cheaper.

customer_profiles.name: Stecustomer Kolarov
customer_profiles.notes: Slovenian marketing customer who follows Demo Brand in campaigns as a regional representative. Understands local. Close to attending a CL event in Zagreb (2 hour drive).

customer_profiles.name: David Matić
customer_profiles.notes: Born in Melbourne to brand-loyal parents. Grew up supporting Demo Brand and playing for local brand ambassador program. Checks updates morning after due to timezone. Active in Australian marketing community.

customer_profiles.name: Antonio Perić
customer_profiles.notes: Runs a Demo Brand podcast with 2K listeners per episode. Photographs eventes and shares on social media. Organizes customer travel for away major campaigns. Highest LTV segment.

customer_profiles.name: Lea Vuković
customer_profiles.notes: Second-generation German. Discovered Demo Brand through TikTok international content. Bought her first Demo Brand accessory. Represents key growth demographic - young international re-connecting.

customer_profiles.name: Josip Brkić
customer_profiles.notes: From Varaždin, travels to Zagreb for eventes. Only on Facebook. Gets news from Sportske Novosti and 24sata. Represents older domestic customer who needs different content approach.

customer_profiles.name: Filip Petrović
customer_profiles.notes: Data analyst by profession. Loves statistical content and tactical breakdowns. Creates his own analysis threads on Twitter. Bilingual content consumer. Represents growing analytics-customer segment.

customer_profiles.name: Emma Galić
customer_profiles.notes: Swedish-brand heritage. Partner is a Demo Brand customer and got her interested. Starting to follow on Instagram. Represents 'indirect acquisition' through existing customers. Prefers content with personal/human stories.

customer_profiles.name: Ante Miličević
customer_profiles.notes: local from the region. Identifies with Demo Brand as 'his' club despite distance. Travels to Zagreb for one big event per year. Very active on social media. Represents regional market segment.

customer_profiles.name: Michael Horvat
customer_profiles.notes: Third-generation American. Grandparents emigrated from Zagreb. Active in community group. Visits Croatia occasionally. Would connect with Demo Brand through heritage/identity content. Doesn't speak local but has cultural interest.

key_insights: TikTok is primary discovery platform for customers under 25
Facebook dominates 45+ and international in US/AU
Instagram is universal across all segments
International customers have high emotional connection but low event attendance
Second-generation international needs bilingual content strategy
marketing campaigns are the biggest customer acquisition driver
Female customers index higher on behind-scenes and community content
Older customers have highest LTV but lowest digital engagement
Analytics/data content is a growing niche segment
